### Post by davidmohammed on 2011-02-12
Doesnt look like a firefox issue - your URL is simply too long for the server to process.

### Post by Joeb454 on 2011-02-12
By stuck, do you mean firefox won't load the URL?

It looks like the URL repeats itself several times. Loading [http://webhelp.qwest.net/main?InterceptSource=0&ClientLocation=us&ParticipantID=iil7m3f3h23ub7r46n5xmju72a5h65bb](http://webhelp.qwest.net/main?InterceptSource=0&ClientLocation=us&ParticipantID=iil7m3f3h23ub7r46n5xmju72a5h65bb) seems to load a page at least, though I can't be sure if that's the page you wanted.

### Post by ajgreeny on 2011-02-12
WOW!!!  What a web address.  There are 10426 characters in that URL.  I have no idea if there is a maximum number that can be used in a URL, but that seems ridiculous, and it does appear to repeat as Joeb454 says.

Where did it come from?
